raw_affiliation_strings: Head of the Energy, Environment and Development Programme at Chatham House, which carries out research on a wide range of topics relating to sustainable development. An international lawyer by training, he has been engaged in the interface between international trade policy and sustainable development for the last 15 years and has published widely in this area. Before joining Chatham House, he was a Legal Offi cer at IUCN (The World Conservation Union) where he led projects relating to the progressive development of international environmental law, such as biodiversity, desertication and climate change
International Union for Conservation of Nature, Dhaka, Bangladesh
